entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop targeted for biofortification to improve micronutrient content in grains.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A cost-effective approach to increase the nutritional value of crops to solve micronutrient deficiencies in human diets.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: Nutritional gaps in human diets that biofortification aims to solve.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to address challenges in phenotyping time, cost, and accuracy in evaluating breeding populations.

entities.name: GRAIN FE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of iron in sorghum grains, used as a target trait for genomic selection.

entities.name: GRAIN ZN CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in sorghum grains, used as a target trait for genomic selection.

entities.name: MT-GBLUP
entities.description: Multi-trait genomic best linear unbiased prediction model used for predicting trait values.

entities.name: ST-GBLUP
entities.description: Single-trait genomic best linear unbiased prediction model used for predicting trait values.

entities.name: PREDICTION ACCURACY
entities.description: A measure of the performance of genomic selection models in predicting trait values.

entities.name: BREEDING RESOURCE-CONSTRAINED SCENARIOS
entities.description: Situations where phenotyping time, cost, and environment availability are limited.

entities.name: AUXILIARY AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Easily scorable non-target traits used to improve the prediction of target traits.

entities.name: GENOMIC ESTIMATED BREEDING VALUES
entities.description: Values estimated via genomic selection to predict the genetic merit of individuals for specific traits.

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average genetic merit of a population per unit time and cost.
